mezze (N) (W)
15-20
choose from 4-6 items: falafel, hummus, vine toast, muhammara, beet & cream cheese on toast, stuffed dates. Served with olives, pickles, pita

cup 5 | bowl 7
MAIN
falafel
11 | 40 (Family)
falafel, hummus, tabbouleh, pickles, tahini, pita. Add smoked potatoes, pickled beets, or 2 vine leaves to any falafel order - $2.50 each
